top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(upVotes), AVG(age)
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_up_votes, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM users u
WHERE u.Id IN (
    SELECT OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    GROUP BY OwnerUserId
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
);

SELECT AVG(upVotes), AVG(age)
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_upvotes, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age, COUNT(p.Id) AS post_count
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_up_votes, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM users u
WHERE u.Id IN (
    SELECT OwnerUserId
    FROM posts
    GROUP BY OwnerUserId
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
);

SELECT AVG(upVotes), AVG(age)
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_upvotes, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age, COUNT(p.Id) AS post_count
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_up_votes, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id, u.UpVotes, u.Age
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
);

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(upVotes), AVG(age)
FROM (
    SELECT u.UpVotes, u.Age
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
) AS qualified_users;
